vllm.title: [Hybrid][torch.compile] Refactor mamba2 forward to avoid obscuring linear projections under custom op
vllm.author: tomeras91
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Currently, the mamba_mixer2 custom op encapsulates the entire forward pass of the Mamba2 block. This is including: the input projection, the token mixing conv + SSM ops, the gated RMSnorm, and the output proj.
The reason the custom op exists is to enable piecewise CUDA graphs - the token mix
